title: 30s Fan Service
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] 3.0's Fan Service             Quote Post by bladerj » Mon Nov 19, 2012 6:37 pm What about the fan service ? I was promised fan service, but so far i saw no one comenting on this, is there a strip scene with Misato like sadamoto artwork ? Or does it only refer to naked Rei (booo) and kaworu and Shinji (that aioyo yo gay thing) ?

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon Nov 19, 2012 6:39 pm Azathoth wrote: I believe there's a scene where Shinji walks in on [naked] Rei Q.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Nov 19, 2012 6:58 pm First, ppl complain about too much fanservice, and now it's too little, apparently. You still get plenty of girls wearing nothing other than plugsuits

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon Nov 19, 2012 7:01 pm Gahh, I just remembered All the "homo homo" vibes Kaworu and Shinji emit in film can and do count as fujoshi fanservice as they tend to gravitate towards subtext anyway. Bits about girls giggling at parts of movie because of that would certainly seem to count as evidence. In other words ┌（┌ ＾o＾）┐ホモォ ┌（┌ ＾o＾）┐ホモォ ┌（┌ ＾o＾）┐ホモォ ┌（┌ ＾o＾）┐ホモォ ┌（┌ ＾o＾）┐ホモォ ┌（┌ ＾o＾）┐ホモォ ┌（┌ ＾o＾）┐ホモォ squad should be happy - at least up to that point I guess this is a sign of my male bias I didn't think of adding this in my first reply

[]:             Quote Post by os189 » Mon Nov 19, 2012 7:30 pm Nope. No strip scenes. And Rei changing was nothing you didn't see in the original TV series. In other words....no nips to be found in the entire film.

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Mon Nov 19, 2012 8:31 pm os189 wrote: Nope. No strip scenes. And Rei changing was nothing you didn't see in the original TV series. In other words....no nips to be found in the entire film.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Mon Nov 19, 2012 8:36 pm Well technically there was, it was just mixed with very messed up scenes. like Asuka's bathtub scene.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Mon Nov 19, 2012 8:41 pm Electric Sachiel wrote: Nips and bouncing bossoms are exactly what we are usually given.

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Mon Nov 19, 2012 8:53 pm Azathoth wrote: there's a pretty decent amount of jiggle in the first scene alone so I wouldn't get excessively distraught over Anno having turned into a srs bzns prude or anything

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon Nov 19, 2012 8:57 pm I guess I should feel like a failure as male because it didn't feel sexy to me at all - and that breathing part has been what both 4chan and 2ch seemed to clamor over the moment preview came out Azathoth wrote: there's a pretty decent amount of jiggle in the first scene alone so I wouldn't get excessively distraught over Anno having turned into a srs bzns prude or anything

[]:             Quote Post by FluffyBunny » Mon Nov 19, 2012 8:57 pm Electric Sachiel wrote: Well I guess. I did find it sexy watching Asuka take in deep breaths, watching her body rise up and down after successfully stopping Unit 01 from falling out of orbit with her booster rockets.

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Mon Nov 19, 2012 9:04 pm Xard wrote: Asuka doesn't have enough to really "jiggle" in my eyes sans that one shot that was in trailers too...

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Mon Nov 19, 2012 9:07 pm EvangelionFan wrote: On a related note, in the six minute preview it feels as if some frames were cut from it, if only because the 'remove my helmet and jump' bit felt longer in the trailers.

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Mon Nov 19, 2012 9:09 pm That isn't what we were talking about, but okay.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon Nov 19, 2012 9:09 pm FluffyBunny wrote: I didn't think of the scene as a fan service, but now I remember -- yep that was sexy. (IMO there's no other reason to show Asuka in such a close up in such a form-fitting outfit.) *edit* Different preferences and tastes I guess.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Mon Nov 19, 2012 9:13 pm EvangelionFan wrote: On a related note, in the six minute preview it feels as if some frames were cut from it

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Nov 19, 2012 9:32 pm There are those ridiculous Wille plugsuits that dip down into (as in, DIG DEEP INTO) the pilot's navel. Honestly ...

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Mon Nov 19, 2012 10:12 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Mon Nov 19, 2012 10:18 pm Well shag me rigid, I never realised that thats Asuka bosoms in the foreground on that shot.

[]: Re: [SPOILERS] The most important question about the movie.             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Nov 20, 2012 4:27 am bladerj wrote: kaworu and Shinji (that aioyo yo gay thing) ?
